runtime_gate.gate: aits validate-data or same validation code path
runtime_gate.output_requirement: downstream result must disclose data_quality_status and source quality report

mechanism_rule: Each ablation layer can add only one primary mechanism.

reader_brief.summary: 通用 ablation runner 合同已定义，B0 static control 和 B1 execution-control runner 已完成；B2-B6 runner 尚未实现。
reader_brief.blocking_issues: B1 evidence is mixed; B2-B6 independent runner and signal robustness evidence are required before later-layer execution.
reader_brief.warnings: Contract readiness and B1 mixed evidence are not approval for B2-B6.
reader_brief.safety_boundary: runner must emit research-only hypothetical outputs only
reader_brief.next_action: review B1 mixed evidence before implementing B2 or B3
